createWallet.title: Ƙirƙiri walat
createWallet.tooltipText: Rubuta waɗannan kalmomi a cikin tsari mai zuwa ko kwafi don adana aminci! Kada ku raba kalmar dawo da ku ga kowa.
createWallet.copyAlert: An yi nasarar kwafin jimlar iri!
createWallet.walletCreateAlert: Shin kun kwafi kuma kun ajiye jumlar iri? Idan ba haka ba, zaku iya rasa walat a nan gaba. Kuna son ƙirƙirar walat?
firstWallet.tooltipText: Don fara amfani da ƙa'idar, matsa ɗaya daga cikin maɓallan da ke ƙasa
generateWallet.tooltipText: Yana iya ɗaukar ɗan lokaci, don Allah a yi haƙuri.
importWallet.title: Shigo da walat
importWallet.tooltipText: Kalmomi 12 sun rabu da sarari guda.
importWallet.invalidSeedAlert: Maganar iri mara inganci. Gwada kuma!
importWallet.invalidTitle: Take mara inganci. Takaitacciyar ƙima. Gwada kuma!
importWallet.notUniqueTitle: Sunan walat riga a jerin. Yi ƙoƙarin amfani da wani don guje wa kuskure.
importWallet.walletImportAlert: Shin kun kwafi kuma kun ajiye jumlar iri? Idan ba haka ba, zaku iya rasa walat a nan gaba. Kuna son shigo da walat?

password.useBioAlert: Kuna so ku yi amfani da tantancewar biometric?
